- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Style/UI update
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactoring
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement

## ✅ Checklist
<!-- Mark completed items with an 'x' -->
- [ ] My code follows the project's code style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have tested my changes in both light and dark modes
- [ ] I have tested responsive design on multiple screen sizes
- [ ] I have checked for accessibility (aria labels, keyboard navigation)
- [ ] All borders are 2px as per design system
- [ ] No gradients used (solid colors only)
- [ ] Brand colors used correctly (Orange: #FF7A00, Blue: #007ACC)
- [ ] Typography follows design system (Montserrat Bold/Poppins Regular)
